things.name: Sao Sebastiao Museum (National Museum)
things.description: Portuguese colonial fort and museum with the history of the cacao island

things.name: Roça Bombaim Cacao Plantation
things.description: Atmospheric 19th-century cacao roça (plantation) with original architecture intact

things.name: Praia Lagoa Azul (Blue Lagoon Beach)
things.description: The island's most photographed beach - perfect curved bay with calm turquoise water

things.name: Obo National Park
things.description: Pristine rainforest covering the volcanic interior with rare endemic birds and primates

things.name: Pico Cão Grande
things.description: Dramatic 663m volcanic needle rising from the jungle - the symbol of São Tomé

things.name: Banana Beach (Praia Banana)
things.description: Quintessential tropical beach used in countless travel advertisements

things.name: Roça Monte Cafe
things.description: Colonial coffee roça at 850m with forest trails and historical coffee machinery

things.name: Principe Island Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO Biosphere Reserve - one of Africa's most pristine islands

things.name: Cidade de São Tomé Old Quarter
things.description: Portuguese colonial streets with brightly coloured facades

things.name: Calulu (Fish & Vegetable Stew)
things.description: National dish - dried fish, palm oil, okra and taro leaves slow-cooked together
